name: Billy Crystal
description: American actor, comedian, writer, producer, director and television presenter (born 1948)
abstract: William Edward Crystal (born March 14, 1948) is an American comedian, actor, and filmmaker. He is known as a stand-up comedian and for his film and stage roles.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: Jack Crystal, who is Billy Crystal’s father, they booked musicians that were available for relatively little.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 9, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris
about_quotes.evidence: Milt Gabler was the A&R man, who incidentally is Billy Crystal’s uncle, darling man, wonderful, I loved him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 21, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: He is, “Get on.” He’s got the [?]. He is the funniest guy, lovingest guy you can ever meet in your life. ... He taught me Cockney slang and all this stuff. ... We’ve been celebrating like maniacs for 40 years.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Johnny Varro
about_quotes.evidence: Jack Crystal, who is Billy Crystal’s dad. That’s why Billy’s got such a great influence in the music of today... he’d be running around the hall there as a little kid
about_quotes.doc_title: Johnny Varro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: We just backed up these guys... I was also the music director from ’81 to ’85. You know Eddie Murphy, Joe Piscopo, Martin Short, Billy Crystal era.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Schaap
about_quotes.evidence: But I knew Jack Crystal and Bernhardt Crystal... And I’ve only met Billy Crystal and spoken with him largely about his father.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Schaap interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003
